history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, waist-up portrait of a young man with dark, tousled hair, his face partially illuminated by dramatic, directional sunlight casting sharp shadows. He is wearing a plain black t-shirt. The lighting creates a strong contrast, with one side of his face and neck in bright light, highlighting his features like his eyes, nose, and lips, while the other side is plunged into deep shadow. His expression is neutral, with his gaze directed slightly off-camera. The background is dark and out of focus, suggesting an indoor setting with minimal ambient light. The overall mood is moody and intimate, with a subtle artistic flair due to the chiaroscuro lighting. The color palette is dominated by dark tones with warm skin tones illuminated by the sunlight.
